name: openafd-chat
description: Sovereäner KI-Arbeitsraum für patriotische Politik — selbst gehostet, ohne Telemetrie, mit Bundestags-Daten und AfD-Branding.
author: Family Team Projects (OpenAfD Chat)

scripts.lint: cd server && yarn lint && cd ../frontend && yarn lint && cd ../collector && yarn lint
scripts.lint:ci: cd server && yarn lint:check && cd ../frontend && yarn lint:check && cd ../collector && yarn lint:check
scripts.setup: cd server && yarn && cd ../collector && yarn && cd ../frontend && yarn && cd .. && yarn setup:envs && yarn prisma:setup && echo "Please run yarn dev:server, yarn dev:collector, and yarn dev:frontend in separate terminal tabs."
scripts.setup:envs: cp -n ./frontend/.env.example ./frontend/.env; cp -n ./server/.env.example ./server/.env.development; cp -n ./collector/.env.example ./collector/.env; cp -n ./docker/.env.example ./docker/.env; echo "All ENV files copied!\n"
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.prisma:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:setup: yarn prisma:generate && yarn prisma:migrate && yarn prisma:seed
scripts.translations:normalize: cd frontend/src/locales && node normalizeEn.mjs && cd ../../.. && cd frontend && yarn lint && cd .. && yarn translations:verify
scripts.translations:prune: cd frontend/src/locales && node findUnusedTranslations.mjs --delete && cd ../../../ && yarn translations:normalize
scripts.translations:create: cd extras/translator && node index.mjs --all && cd ../../frontend && yarn lint && cd ../..
